channel.title: Tui on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Tui on Arrans github.io

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: noborus/ov
item.description: 🎑Feature-rich terminal-based text viewer. It is a so-called terminal pager.

item.title: jarun/nnn
item.description: n³ The unorthodox terminal file manager

item.title: Maxteabag/sqlit
item.description: A user friendly TUI for SQL databases. Written in python. Supports SQL server, Mysql, PostreSQL, SQLite, Turso and more.

item.title: charmbracelet/bubbletea
item.description: A powerful little TUI framework 🏗

item.title: blackwell-systems/shelfctl
item.description: PDF/EPUB library CLI/TUI backed by GitHub Release assets (Git LFS alternative). On-demand per-file downloads, metadata catalog, migrate/split bloated repos.

item.title: ayn2op/discordo
item.description: A lightweight, secure, and feature-rich Discord terminal (TUI) client.

item.title: ClementTsang/bottom
item.description: Yet another cross-platform graphical process/system monitor.

item.title: dlvhdr/gh-dash
item.description: A rich terminal UI for GitHub that doesn’t break your flow.

item.title: pvolok/mprocs
item.description: Run multiple commands in parallel

item.title: apognu/tuigreet
item.description: Graphical console greeter for greetd

item.title: F1bonacc1/process-compose
item.description: Process Compose is a simple and flexible scheduler and orchestrator to manage non-containerized applications.

item.title: dlvhdr/diffnav
item.description: A git diff pager based on delta but with a file tree, à la GitHub.

item.title: pythops/bluetui
item.description: 🛜 TUI for managing bluetooth on Linux

item.title: muesli/duf
item.description: Disk Usage/Free Utility - a better ‘df’ alternative

item.title: yorukot/superfile
item.description: Pretty fancy and modern terminal file manager

item.title: pterm/pterm
item.description: ✨ PTerm is a modern Go module to easily beautify console output. Featuring charts, progressbars, tables, trees, text input, select menus and much more 🚀 It’s completely configurable and 100% cross-platform compatible.

item.title: saulpw/visidata
item.description: A terminal spreadsheet multitool for discovering and arranging data

item.title: fairyglade/ly
item.description: A lightweight TUI (ncurses-like) display manager for Linux and BSD (mirror of https://codeberg.org/fairyglade/ly).

item.title: Genivia/ugrep
item.description: 🔍 ugrep 7.6 file pattern searcher – a user-friendly, faster, more capable grep replacement. Includes a TUI, Google-like Boolean search with AND/OR/NOT, fuzzy search, hexdumps, searches (nested) archives (zip, 7z, tar, pax, cpio), compressed files (gz, Z, bz2, lzma, xz, lz4, zstd, brotli), pdfs, docs, and more

item.title: Adembc/lazyssh
item.description: A terminal-based SSH manager inspired by lazydocker and k9s - Written in go

item.title: veeso/termscp
item.description: 🖥 A feature rich terminal UI file transfer and explorer with support for SCP/SFTP/FTP/S3/SMB

item.title: Julien-cpsn/ATAC
item.description: A simple API client (postman like) in your terminal

item.title: ymgyt/syndicationd
item.description: A TUI Feed Viewer

item.title: zaghaghi/openapi-tui
item.description: Terminal UI to list, browse and run APIs defined with openapi spec.

item.title: nemuTUI/nemu
item.description: Ncurses UI for QEMU

item.title: shubh-io/DockMate
item.description: Dockmate: The open-source Docker TUI & Podman manager for terminal productivity. A fast, lightweight alternative to lazydocker built in Go.

item.title: mrusme/neonmodem
item.description: Neon Modem Overdrive (https://codeberg.org/mrus/neonmodem)

item.title: GianlucaP106/mynav
item.description: Workspace and session management TUI

item.title: lusingander/stu
item.description: TUI explorer application for Amazon S3 (AWS S3) 🪣

item.title: bluetuith-org/bluetuith
item.description: A cross-platform TUI bluetooth manager.

item.title: yeeaiclub/fasttui
item.description: very fast tui

item.title: muesli/gitty
item.description: Contextual information about your git projects, right on the command-line

item.title: aaronjanse/3mux
item.description: Terminal multiplexer inspired by i3

item.title: nathabonfim59/gitid
item.description: A tool to stop sending work commits with your personal email
